description_long: This bungalow complex features a sprawling single-story layout with multiple interconnected sections, including a large central courtyard, several outbuildings, and a prominent dark gable-roofed structure. The property is surrounded by green hedges and includes paved driveways, parking areas with vehicles, and a glass-roofed sunroom or patio. The main building is constructed with a mix of brick and light-colored siding, and the windows are arranged in both grouped and individual patterns across the facades. Outdoor spaces include a deck with seating and landscaped areas, while the overall design emphasizes open, accessible living with clear separations between private and communal zones. The architectural style is modern with functional, clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow complex with a central courtyard, multiple outbuildings, a large gable roof, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design features brick and light siding, grouped windows, and a glass-roofed patio.
description_view_0: From this view, the large dark gable roof and central courtyard are prominent, with the main building and outbuildings clearly visible along the perimeter.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the driveway, parking area with vehicles, and the glass-roofed sunroom or patio at the front, with the main entrance area visible.
description_view_2: Here, the side deck with outdoor seating and the arrangement of outbuildings and vehicles are more apparent, showing the complex's depth and layout.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the rear of the main gable-roofed structure and the overall symmetry of the bungalow's layout, with the courtyard and outbuildings in view.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
